characters.name: Adonis
characters.description: Adonisis the announcer for the Gargantuan Greek Games, appearing only in the episodeInfernal Flame.

characters.name: Atlas
characters.description: Atlasis one of the Greek gods, and one of three judges for the Gargantuan Greek Games. He only appeared in the episodeInfernal Flame.

characters.name: Atlas
characters.description: Atlasis one of the Greek gods, and one of three judges for the Gargantuan Greek Games. He only appeared in the episodeInfernal Flame.

characters.name: Attila the Hot Bun King
characters.description: Attila the Hot Bun Kingis the master baker of hot buns. He only appeared in the episodeAttila's Hot Buns. King Allfireintended for him to be the guest of honor at the Barbarians and Bureaucrats meeting, but his invitation was accidentally switched with a letter fromSir Loungelot(intended forDweasel the Weasel) declaring war. When Attila received the letter, he responded by gathering an army from several countries and catapulting flaming buns and dumplings at Camelhot, untilFlickerwaved a white flag for surrender. Afterward, Attila was at peace with Camelhot and they began the party, until it was crashed by a bear.

characters.name: Attila the Hot Bun King
characters.description: Attila the Hot Bun Kingis the master baker of hot buns. He only appeared in the episodeAttila's Hot Buns. King Allfireintended for him to be the guest of honor at the Barbarians and Bureaucrats meeting, but his invitation was accidentally switched with a letter fromSir Loungelot(intended forDweasel the Weasel) declaring war. When Attila received the letter, he responded by gathering an army from several countries and catapulting flaming buns and dumplings at Camelhot, untilFlickerwaved a white flag for surrender. Afterward, Attila was at peace with Camelhot and they began the party, until it was crashed by a bear.

characters.name: Beowolf
characters.description: Beowolfis a giant monster, andCount Geoffrey's pet. He is apparently very ferocious, as the skeleton of a carnivore has been seen in his room. Beowolf is never seen, only his shadow is. InChain Mail Letter,MerletellsSir Loungelotto go to see Beowolf to cure his hiccups. When Beowolf appeared (off screen), he scared the hiccups out of Loungelot. It is unknown what became of him when Castle Threadbare sank into the moat due Geoffrey falling victim to the curse of the chain mail letter.

characters.name: Cassandra
characters.description: Cassandrais a damsel in distress that is "attacked" by a spider, whichFlickertakes away, and Cassandra falls in admiration with Flicker, who she thinks to be a knight, and follows him everywhere sure the fact he saved her means they are now promised to each other. The whole situation makesPrincess Flamejealous, although after getting Cassandra to try onPierre Un Deux Trois's designs she begins to like her. Cassandra eventually breaks up with Flicker (before Flicker can do so himself), as he wasn't newtish enough for her (due to the newt design of Pierre and theHag of Giss).

characters.name: Cassandra

characters.name: Castle Guards
characters.description: Castle Guards are Camelot‘s Royal Guards They only appear in tournament day.

characters.name: Chancellor
characters.description: TheChancelloris a dragon in Camelhot. He is the one who helpsKing Allfirewrite theCode of Chivalry. Like him, he gets annoyed when Allfire accidentally calls inCinder and Clinkeras the jesters. InExcaliburn, when Allfire seemingly lost his right to rule, the Chancellor and the dragon knights all competed for the throne, until Allfire pulled Excaliburn from the stone again. His role in this episode is mute.

characters.name: Chancellor
characters.description: TheChancelloris a dragon in Camelhot. He is the one who helpsKing Allfirewrite theCode of Chivalry. His role in this episode is mute.

characters.name: Chef Turnspit
characters.description: Chef Turnspitis the chef for Camelhot. His first appearance is inTournament Day, and his final appearance was a small cameo dancing with a peasant inSphinx Jinx(during the only scene in the episode thatAllfire,Griddle, andFlameappear).

characters.name: Chef Turnspit
characters.description: Chef Turnspitis the chef for Camelhot. His first appearance is inTournament Day, and his final appearance was a small cameo dancing with a peasant inSphinx Jinx(during the only scene in the episode thatAllfire,Griddle, andFlameappear).

characters.name: Cinder and Clinker
characters.description: Cinder and Clinkerare a 2 headed dragon. They areKing Allfire's messengers and jesters, although sometimes they annoy him. Cinder is the upbeat, energetic left head while Clinker is the depressed, sullen right head. They are implied to have become a two-headed dragon due to a chain mail letter curse.

characters.name: Cinder and Clinker
characters.description: Cinder and Clinkerare a 2 headed dragon. They areKing Allfire's messengers and jesters, although sometimes they annoy him. Cinder is the upbeat, energetic left head while Clinker is the depressed, sullen right head. They are implied to have become a two-headed dragon due to a chain mail letter curse.

characters.name: Clam League
characters.description: Clam League are a trio of dragons in hoodies and loves the surf.

characters.name: Count Geoffrey
characters.description: Count Geoffrey, as he appeared in the first season Count Geoffrey is a evil human andthe main antagonist In the series, He is always trying to take over Camelhot. His henchmen areEvil Knights 1, 2, and 3. He also has anEvil Spy, and sometimes calls for help from the wicked alchemist,Merle the Wizard. He also exploits and taxes the peasants of the local village near his castle,Castle Threadbare. In thefirst episode, he kidnappedQueen Griddlefor the ransom of Castle Camelhot, however,King Allfiredidn't bother reading the ransom note due to seeking the Holy Quail, and Griddle was spared from being eaten by the monster, Yugmort the Many-Fanged, when she scared him off by yelling at him.

characters.name: Count Geoffrey

characters.name: Cowsius Clay
characters.description: Cowsius Clay, orCauwsiuclay(as spelled in his poster) is a cow, a bully, and the leader of a gang of cows in Spain called the Mooers. He only appeared inThe Reign in Spain. He is voiced byRichard Yearwood. Cowsius is undefeated in 800 boxing matches, and killed many of his opponents. His promoter and manager isKing Don, who is conspiring with him on a real estate scam and is always betting on him. When the dragons of Camelhot came to Spain,Flickerfought against Cowsius, andFlamegave him a red cape thatBlazebought at a shop. Cowsius was enraged by the red cape and attacked it rather than Flicker, eventually slamming into a dead cow hanging from the ceiling, which dazed him. Flicker knocked him to the ground and won the battle.

characters.name: Cowsius Clay
characters.description: Cowsius Clay, orCauwsiuclay(as spelled in his poster) is a cow, a bully, and the leader of a gang of cows in Spain called the Mooers. He only appeared inThe Reign in Spain. characters.name: Cupid
characters.description: Cupidis the god of affection and desire. Anyone shot with his arrows will fall in love with the first thing they see In the episodeWhine and Roses, Cupid is hired byCount Geoffreyto make Griddle fall in love with him. He tried many ways of shooting arrows at her, but hitBurnevere,Blaze, andAllfireinstead, causing them to fall in love withCinder and Clinker, a statue, and a moose head, respectively. Cupid's final attempt was foiled when Flicker knocked him down, and the arrow hitSir Loungelotinstead, causing him to fall in love with Geoffrey. Presumably Cupid was fired after this.

characters.name: Cupid
characters.description: Cupidis the god of affection and desire. Anyone shot with his arrows will fall in love with the first thing they see In the episodeWhine and Roses, Cupid is hired byCount Geoffreyto make Griddle fall in love with him. Cupid's final attempt was foiled when Flicker knocked him down, and the arrow hitSir Loungelotinstead, causing him to fall in love with Geoffrey. Presumably Cupid was fired after this.

characters.name: Duke Rudolph
characters.description: Duke Rudolphis an evil man who wants to destroy Camelhot. He is the antagonist of the episodeThe Age of Retention. Rudolph's castle got the attention ofKing Allfire, who disliked it and went over to the castle with his knights, andFlicker. Rudolph showed them his toy factory, but Flicker andPrincess Flamesuspected him, and while investigating, became trapped in a cage. Rudolph trapped Allfire,Sir Blaze,Sir Burnevere, andSir Loungelotinside his war machine, BARRY, forcing them to heat its boiler with their fiery breath, threatening to kill Flame if they didn't. Rudolph drove BARRY over to Camelhot to destroy it, but Flicker and Flame escaped from their cage and catapulted Griddle's fruitcakes at BARRY. As the hardest substance known to dragonkind, the fruitcakes smashed through BARRY, knocking it into the moat and causing the cockpit to explode, sending Rudolph flying into the distance. It is unknown if he survived, but he has not been seen since.

characters.name: Duncan
characters.description: Duncanis a dragon from Scotland. He runs a golf course. WhenSir Loungelotdug a hole trying to his his golf ball, Duncan pulled the club from the stone of St. Andrews to chase after him. By doing so he proved that he was related toSir William Furnace, as no one else could have pulled the club from the stone. He threw the golf club at Loungelot but hitMacBreathinstead, who was about to killSir Burnevere. After this, Duncan became king.

characters.name: Duncan
characters.description: Duncanis a dragon from Scotland. He runs a golf course. characters.name: Dweasel the Weasel
characters.description: Dweasel the Weaselis the discount dry cleaner for Camelhot, although this is because everything he cleans ends up shrunken and bleached. Sir Loungelotgot his tunic cleaned by Dweasel, and when he saw the results he wrote a letter waging war on him. When Flicker delivered it toFreddythe mail dragon of Camelhot along with an invitation as the guest of honor, Dweasel took the invitation instead of the letter, causing the letter to go toAttila the Hot Bun King. He only appears in the episodeAttila's Hot Buns.

characters.name: Dweasel the Weasel

He only appears in the episodeAttila's Hot Buns.

characters.name: Dwight
characters.description: DwightGenderMaleSpeciesGiantVoice actorLen Carlson Dwightis a giant who lives on the Isle of Dwight. He only appeared in the episodeThe Isle of Dwight. When his belt buckle broke, he went to England to get the blacksmith to fix it, but the people were afraid by his size and, thinking him to be invading, attacked him, causing him to accidentally crush his glasses.Sir Herman the Nearsightedlent him his glasses and his shield for a belt buckle, and said he would make him new clothes, but was lost at sea trying to reach the Isle of Dwight.

characters.name: Dwight
characters.description: DwightGenderMaleSpeciesGiantVoice actorLen Carlson Dwightis a giant who lives on the Isle of Dwight. He only appeared in the episodeThe Isle of Dwight. characters.name: Erik the Well-Read (character)
characters.description: Erik the Well-Readis a Viking. Appearing in the episodeErik the Well-Read, he seeks the treasure of Breezebrain, traveling with the dragons after the stone containing the clues, as it was lodged inEvil Knight 2's helmet andCount Geoffreywas seeking the treasure. Flickercreated a Polvo (a boat with wheels) and a raft out of assembled furniture, which Erik took note of during their travels. Eventually they got the treasure, partially due to Geoffrey's dissatisfaction that the treasure was Breezebrain's recipes. With the recipes and ideas for new inventions, Erik returned to Sweden.

characters.name: Evil Knights 1, 2, and 3
characters.description: Evil Knights 1, 2, and 3 Evil Knights 1, 2, and 3areCount Geoffrey's henchmen. Evil Knight 1 is fat, has a mustache, and a high-pitched voice and voiced by John Koensgen (Season 1), Evil Knight 2 is small and speaks with an Italian accent and voiced by John Stocker and Evil Knight 3 is the biggest and stupidest of the three and voiced by late Dan Hennessey.

characters.name: Evil Knights 1, 2, and 3
characters.description: Evil Knights 1, 2, and 3 Evil Knights 1, 2, and 3areCount Geoffrey's henchmen. Evil Knight 1 is fat, has a mustache, and a high-pitched voice and voiced by John Koensgen (Season 1), Evil Knight 2 is small and speaks with an Italian accent and voiced by John Stocker and Evil Knight 3 is the biggest and stupidest of the three and voiced by late Dan Hennessey.

characters.name: Evil Spy
characters.description: TheEvil SpyisCount Geoffrey's spy. He is a human disguised as a dragon. He gathers information by spying on the dragons of Camelhot, and gives it to Geoffrey, although his voice is never heard onscreen (aside from him saying "Psst!" in his final episode). There are in fact three Evil Spies in the course of the show. The first has a light purple dragon costume. InA Gift for Griddle, he is knocked into the moat by Count Geoffrey and eaten by crocodiles. He is replaced with an identical Evil Spy afterward, but inShamrocks & Shenaniganshe is vacuumed up byEvil Knight 1. The third and final Evil Spy, whost fate is left unknown, has a green dragon costume.

characters.name: Evil Spy
characters.description: TheEvil SpyisCount Geoffrey's spy. He is a human disguised as a dragon. characters.name: Female of the Fjords
characters.description: TheFemale of the Fjordsis a dragon on top of a boat in a lake. In the episodeExcaliburn,King Allfirefinds her lake while searching for theLady of the Lake. He asks her if she knows anything about swords, and she says she only knows about axes Of the dragons King Allfire comes across during his search, the Female of the Fjords is one of the only two to be seen onscreen, the other being thePrincess of the Pond.

characters.name: Female of the Fjords
characters.description: TheFemale of the Fjordsis a dragon on top of a boat in a lake. In the episodeExcaliburn,King Allfirefinds her lake while searching for theLady of the Lake. He asks her if she knows anything about swords, and she says she only knows about axes Of the dragons King Allfire comes across during his search, the Female of the Fjords is one of the only two to be seen onscreen, the other being thePrincess of the Pond.

characters.name: Flamiano
characters.description: Flamianois a flamboyant Italian inventor. He only appeared in the episodeRenaissance Dragon. He came to Camelhot with his various inventions (such as the vacuum), introducing the Renaissance. Most of the dragons loved his inventions, with the exception ofKing Allfire.Flickerbecame Flamiano's assistant, to the point of quitting his job asLoungelot's squire. Flamiano finally won Allfire over by making a rocket with gunpowder, intending to send him to the moon. Flicker andPrincess Flame, on the other hand, did not think this would be safe (after witnessing some gunpowder explode), so they tried to stop him, but Flamiano fired Flicker. However, Flicker trickedCount Geoffreyand his Evil Knights into going aboard the rocket, which crashed into Castle Threadbare.

characters.name: Flamiano

characters.name: Flicker
characters.description: FlickerSeason 1Season 2LikesPrincess FlameGenderMaleSpeciesDragonVoice actorEdward GlenFirst appearenceLast appearenceThe Quest for the Holy QuailSlay the Dragon Flickeris the protagonist of the series Blazing Dragons. He isSir Loungelot's squire, but Loungelot treats him more like a servant. He is also secretly in love withPrincess Flame, but unlike her he is shy about showing this. He goes on nearly every major quest in every episode. He is also an inventor, and often his inventions help him foilCount Geoffrey's evil plans, although his inventions seem to diminish in Season 2. His inventions include an automatic hairstyling machine, a magnet, and a sword polisher.

characters.name: Flicker

characters.name: Freddy
characters.description: Freddyis the mail dragon of Camelhot. He only appeared in the episodeAttila's Hot Buns.

characters.name: Freddy
characters.description: Freddyis the mail dragon of Camelhot. He only appeared in the episodeAttila's Hot Buns.

characters.name: Gavin
characters.description: Gavin is a deleted character in blazing dragons.

characters.name: Hag of Giss
characters.description: TheHag of GissisMerle the Wizard's sister. She was voiced byJayne Eastwood. InNewt for a Day, she staged a scene pretending to be a damsel being attacked by a three-headed dog.Sir Loungelotrefused to kiss a hag, so the hag turned him into a newt. It was initially believed that she did so because Loungelot judged her by looks alone, but she later revealed that she turned him into a newt for the sheer fun of it. Later,Princess Flametried to convince her to turn Loungelot back to normal, but instead she turned Flame into a frog. Flame told her that this was nothing to brag about and that it would be more impressive to turn her into a two-headed eagle with bat wings and tiger claws. The hag turned Flame into this creature, and Flame took her to Camelhot, where she became the guest of honor at the fashion ball, fell in love withPierre Un Deux Trois, and left to make the newt a new design that became the rage in Paris. Before she left, she returned Loungelot and Flame to their original forms.

characters.name: Hag of Giss

characters.name: Hercules
characters.description: Herculesis a demigod of Greece, and one of the judges of the Gargantuan Greek Games in the episode,Infernal Flame.

characters.name: Hercules
characters.description: Herculesis a demigod of Greece, and one of the judges of the Gargantuan Greek Games in the episode,Infernal Flame.

characters.name: Herman
characters.description: Herman, with Princess Flame This article is about the hermit. For Blaze's father, seeSir Herman the Nearsighted. Hermanis a grouchy hermit who lives at the Hermit's Hideaway. He became annoyed whenSir Blazearrived, and agreed to help Flicker lead the other knights away so that Blaze could prove himself to them by rescuingPrincess Flamein a staged kidnapping, since Herman wanted Blaze out of the hideaway.
